name: Hoff (OOO Domashny Interier)
business_profile: Largest furniture and household goods retailer in Russia, often referred to as the 'Russian IKEA'. Major importer of upholstered furniture and accessories.

name: Sportmaster (OOO Sportmaster)
business_profile: Leading sports retailer in Russia and CIS. Huge importer of fitness equipment, including yoga mats and sports accessories under private labels (Demix, Torneo).

name: Divan.ru (OOO Divan Trade)
business_profile: Leading online furniture retailer specializing in modern upholstered furniture, including foam-based and compact sofas.

name: Askona (OOO TD Askona)
business_profile: Largest manufacturer and retailer of sleep products in Russia. Imports high-quality foam and components for compressed sofas and mattresses.

name: Lazurit (OOO TD Lazurit)
business_profile: National furniture retail chain with over 500 stores. Major player in upholstered furniture sales.

name: Stolplit (OOO MF Stolplit)
business_profile: One of the oldest and largest furniture manufacturers and retailers in Russia, focusing on budget-friendly solutions.

name: Shatura (AO MK Shatura)
business_profile: Major furniture company specializing in home and office furniture. Part of the Kaza Mia retail group.

name: Maria (OOO Mebel Factory Maria)
business_profile: Known primarily for kitchens, but has expanded into living room furniture and upholstered items.

name: Dyatkovo (OOO Dyatkovo-DOZ)
business_profile: Premium furniture brand with a focus on design and high-quality materials, part of the dmi group.

name: Trial-Sport (OOO Trial-Sport)
business_profile: Major specialized sports retailer focused on cycling, skiing, and fitness equipment.

name: Kant (OOO Kant)
business_profile: Retail chain and wholesaler of sports goods. Major importer of fitness and outdoor equipment.

name: Desport (OOO ARM)
business_profile: Successor to Decathlon in Russia. Retains major infrastructure and import capacity for mass-market sports goods.

name: Lestate (OOO Lestate)
business_profile: Largest wholesaler and distributor of international sports brands (Nike, Adidas, etc.) in Russia.

name: Ozon (OOO Internet Resheniya)
business_profile: Leading e-commerce platform that also acts as a direct importer for its private label furniture and fitness lines.

name: Wildberries (OOO Wildberries)
business_profile: Largest online retailer in Russia. Sources and imports massive volumes of home goods and sports equipment.

name: Lemana Pro / Leroy Merlin (OOO Le Monlid)
business_profile: Largest DIY and home improvement chain. Huge importer of garden furniture, yoga mats, and small storage furniture.

name: Angstrem (OOO PK Angstrem)
business_profile: Major furniture manufacturer and retailer based in Voronezh, with a large national network.

name: Moon (OOO Zhivye Divany)
business_profile: Specialized upholstered furniture manufacturer and retailer. One of the leaders in the sofa segment.

name: 8 Marta (GK 8 Marta)
business_profile: Group of companies producing high-end upholstered furniture, very influential in the Moscow market.

name: First Furniture Factory (1MF)
business_profile: Large-scale manufacturer and retailer based in Saint Petersburg, focusing on kitchens and upholstered items.

name: Gliver (OOO Gliver)

name: RamaYoga (OOO Ramayoga)

name: Ambient Lounge Russia (OOO Ambient Lounge)

name: Starfit (OOO Starfit)

name: Stool Group (OOO Stool Group)

name: AsiaOptom (OOO Asia Optom)

name: Top League / Vysshaya Liga (OOO Vysshaya Liga)

name: Yogamatic (OOO Yogamatic)

name: Megasport (OOO Megasport)

name: MyPuff (OOO MyPuff)
